name: AppLovin Mobile Marketing Platform API
what_it_does: Mobile marketing and monetization platform with REST API — providing user acquisition (AppLovin Ads), ad monetization mediation (MAX), e-commerce marketing (AppLovin Commerce), and ML-powered targeting for mobile game and app publishers, with rewarded video, interstitial, and banner ad formats.
use_cases: Managing mobile app user acquisition campaigns via AppLovin API for install optimization
Configuring MAX mediation waterfalls and ad network settings programmatically
Pulling campaign performance data (CPI, ROAS, retention) for mobile growth analytics
Integrating AppLovin with MMP (Adjust, AppsFlyer) for cross-channel attribution
Managing rewarded video and interstitial ad monetization via MAX API
not_for: Web advertising campaigns (AppLovin is mobile-native; use Google Ads for web)
B2B lead generation (AppLovin targets mobile app and game audiences)
Small indie apps (<$5K/month revenue) — AppLovin MAX mediation ROI requires meaningful volume
best_when: A mobile game or app publisher needs both user acquisition (AppLovin Ads) and ad monetization (MAX mediation) from a single platform, with AI-powered optimization for both sides of the mobile advertising equation.
avoid_when: You don't have a mobile app or game, primarily build subscription apps (vs ad-supported), or need brand advertising rather than performance user acquisition.

auth.notes: API key from AppLovin dashboard. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. Webhook for conversion events and MAX ad revenue postbacks. SDK (MAX SDK) for in-app ad mediation — separate from REST API key. MMP integration for attribution postbacks. No OAuth2. MAX reporting API separate from Ads reporting API.

pricing.free_tier_limits: MAX mediation free; AppLovin Ads pay per performance
pricing.paid_tiers: CPI/ROAS-based pricing for Ads; MAX is revenue share on mediated ads
pricing.notes: Palo Alto company. Founded 2012. NASDAQ listed (APP). $3.3B+ revenue (2023). CEO Adam Foroughi. Largest independent mobile ad tech company. MAX Mediation has 30,000+ apps integrated. AXON ML targeting engine. Acquired MoPub from Twitter (2021, then divested). Acquired Mintegral/MobVista assets. E-commerce expansion into non-gaming with AppLovin Commerce. Controversial in gaming due to acquisition of Tripledot, Lion Studios game studios.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per account; enterprise limits available

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for Ads campaigns, MAX mediation, and reporting. API key auth. Good developer documentation. MAX SDK integration required for in-app monetization (separate from REST API). MMP integration for attribution. Separate reporting APIs for Ads and MAX. Webhook for conversion and ad revenue postbacks. SDK for iOS, Android, Unity, React Native, Flutter.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Report reads fully idempotent. Campaign reads idempotent. Campaign creation not idempotent — check by name before creating. MAX waterfall configuration updates not fully idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: MAX SDK and REST API are separate — SDK in-app, REST API for campaign/reporting management
MAX Mediation requires separate SDK integration per ad network in waterfall
COPPA: children's apps cannot use behavioral targeting — set kids mode in MAX SDK
IDFA deprecation on iOS — plan for ATT-consented and non-consented audience segments
AppLovin Commerce expansion (non-gaming) is newer — may have less mature documentation

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR, CCPA, COPPA compliant. US and EU data residency. API key auth. NASDAQ-listed company with public security standards. Mobile device data (IDFA, GAID) requires ATT consent for iOS. COPPA: strict prohibition on behavioral data collection for children under 13. MAX ad revenue postback data contains sensitive monetization metrics — secure postback endpoints.
